name: Wastbygg Gruppen AB (publ)
summary: Wastbygg Gruppen AB operates as a construction and property development company in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark. It operates through three segments: Residential, Commercial, and Logistics and Industry. The Residential segment develops and produces multi-dwelling buildings. The Commercial segment constructs commercial and community properties, office buildings, and hotels. The Logistics and Industry segment constructs and develops logistics and industrial properties. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden. Wastbygg Gruppen AB is a subsidiary of M2 Holding AB.
